data.content:
The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but never added to the `Compile` item group, so the C# compiler doesn't see it.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to `Compile` items after writing it.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates `GeneratedInfo.cs` into the intermediate output path. However, it never adds this generated file to the `Compile` item group, so the C# compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group after writing it. I need to add an `ItemGroup` with a `Compile Include` for the generated file inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-5621239995cb44c0b6b0a85e6aae4c32/TestProject.csproj", "old_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>"}

toolArgs.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly now.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to the intermediate output directory but never added it to the `Compile` item group. The C# compiler only compiles files in that item group, so the generated file was ignored.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="...">` item inside the target, after the file is written, so MSBuild includes it in compilation.
